collection: Artesanías de Colombia reports about Tello, Huila
license_policy: license-first — only redistribute documents with explicit CC-BY / CC-BY-SA / public-domain permissions; external link for the rest (CC-BY-NC*, CC-BY-NC-SA, CC-BY-NC-ND, all rights reserved, UNKNOWN)
scope_note: Includes only reports whose primary subject is the municipality of Tello, Huila. Broader Huila-departmental and Tello-adjacent items were deliberately excluded.

methodology_notes.selection_criteria: Top 13 results by relevance score whose primary subject is the municipality of Tello, Huila (excluding Huila-departmental reports that only mention Tello in passing).
methodology_notes.license_verification: Each item's DSpace handle page was fetched and the DC.rights metadata block + embedded Creative Commons license URL was parsed. License assignment is per the explicit Creative Commons license URL on each item page.
methodology_notes.anti_bot_workaround: The repository is protected by BunkerWeb with a JavaScript proof-of-work challenge. To verify licenses and obtain bitstream URLs, the BunkerWeb PoW challenge was solved once per handle-page request using only the standard hashlib + urllib stdlib (no package install). Session cookies are not persisted.
